title: Issue #2590 Escape-Recenter Static-Deadlock Controlled Trace
outcome: The matched escape-only versus escape+recenter slice completed with all required static-deadlock trace fields; static recenter activated in one of nine pairs and changed trace/local-minimum state, but did not create a terminal success rescue

failure_mechanism.label: static_deadlock_or_local_minimum
failure_mechanism.rationale: The discriminating active row removes the local-minimum indicator under the escape+recenter intervention but still times out, so the recenter signal is present without benchmark-strength success evidence

mechanism_activation.name: escape_recenter_pair
mechanism_activation.evidence: One classic_bottleneck_low seed-113 intervention row had four positive static_recenter decision terms and changed command/trajectory/local-minimum fields; terminal outcome remained max_steps failure

paired_comparator.name: issue_2170_static_escape_only baseline versus issue_2170_static_escape_recenter_no_transit intervention
paired_comparator.outcome: All nine pairs completed. Four pairs were inactive, four were already solved by both candidates, and one active pair changed trace state without terminal success

trace_evidence.raw_output_policy: raw activation_trace.json was worktree-local and summarized into tracked compact evidence

alternative_explanations: The 120-step stop rule is intentionally comparable to #2588, so this is not benchmark-candidate evidence
The baseline already has static escape enabled; rows solved by both candidates cannot demonstrate added recenter value
The active row improved the local-minimum trace classification but did not reach the goal, so the intervention signal is not a planner-improvement claim

decision.rationale: Controlled trace evidence exists for the semantic pair, but the result is mixed/negative and not strong enough for benchmark-candidate promotion
decision.next_step: If more evidence is needed, run a separately predeclared horizon-sensitivity slice or broadened scenario slice before considering benchmark-candidate status
